package rulefixtures

// scenario for range_copy_large_struct: `for _, v := range largeStructSlice` where the struct is > 64 bytes
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule628NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario628Negative(records []Rule628NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
